name: Moon Tower
short_description: Play as a mechanical being, defeat all enemies, and retrieve the crucial item. Moon Tower is a fast-paced game where you must constantly dodge enemies and eliminate them within each room. Gain different abilities to strengthen yourself and enhance your power.
detailed_description:
You can post your suggestions or bugs in the discussion forum 

A crucial fragment of the Heart of the Earth has been stolen. As a mechanized being re-engineered by its power, you are dispatched to the Moon Tower. Your mission: defeat all enemies, survive the perilous journey, and reclaim the lost fragment of the Heart of the Earth.

points for attention:

  • This store page uses machine translation for in-game text.

Game Feature

  • Automatic Firing

  • Use Skills to Eliminate Enemies ( 50 +)

  • Passive Abilities and Various Attack Methods ( 200 +)

  • Fast-Paced Action

  • Choose different traits to challenge each game.
